title: External Apps - App Launch and Basic Connectivity - TV STB
precondition: STB onboarding is completed. Internet connection is available. User is on STB Home screen. External apps carousel is visible on Home screen. YouTube, Netflix, Prime Video and Spotify apps are available on the STB. Netflix account is available for login. Mobile phone is connected to the same network as the STB for Spotify testing.

steps.step: Navigate to external apps carousel on Home screen
steps.expectedResult: Carousel with YouTube, Netflix, Prime Video and Spotify is visible

steps.step: Open YouTube from external apps carousel
steps.expectedResult: YouTube app launches successfully

steps.step: Continue as guest
steps.expectedResult: YouTube home screen loads without sign-in

steps.step: Start playback of free video
steps.expectedResult: Video playback starts successfully

steps.step: Exit YouTube app
steps.expectedResult: User returns to STB Home screen

steps.step: Navigate to external apps carousel on Home screen
steps.expectedResult: Carousel with external apps is visible

steps.step: Open Netflix from external apps carousel
steps.expectedResult: Netflix app launches successfully

steps.step: Verify login state
steps.expectedResult: User is either already logged in or login screen is shown

steps.step: Sign in to Netflix account if not already logged in
steps.expectedResult: Netflix login succeeds

steps.step: Start playback of available Netflix content
steps.expectedResult: Netflix content starts playing successfully

steps.step: Exit Netflix app
steps.expectedResult: User returns to STB Home screen

steps.step: Navigate to external apps carousel on Home screen
steps.expectedResult: Carousel with external apps is visible

steps.step: Open Prime Video from external apps carousel
steps.expectedResult: Prime Video app launches successfully

steps.step: Browse content without logging in
steps.expectedResult: Prime Video content catalogue loads

steps.step: Sign in to Prime Video account if required
steps.expectedResult: Prime Video login succeeds

steps.step: Start playback of available content
steps.expectedResult: Prime Video content starts playing successfully

steps.step: Exit Prime Video app
steps.expectedResult: User returns to STB Home screen

steps.step: Navigate to external apps carousel on Home screen
steps.expectedResult: Carousel with external apps is visible

steps.step: Open Spotify from external apps carousel
steps.expectedResult: Spotify app launches and is visible as a playback device

steps.step: Ensure mobile phone is connected to same network as STB
steps.expectedResult: Phone and STB are on the same network

steps.step: Open Spotify on mobile phone and start playing a song
steps.expectedResult: Song starts playing on mobile device

steps.step: Open device picker in Spotify mobile app
steps.expectedResult: Available playback devices are displayed

steps.step: Select Siminn B&O device
steps.expectedResult: Playback transfers to STB device

steps.step: Verify playback through STB
steps.expectedResult: Audio plays through STB / Siminn B&O

steps.step: Exit Spotify app
steps.expectedResult: User returns to STB Home screen
